case: An unauthenticated user cannot list users.
An unauthenticated user cannot get current user detail.
An unauthenticated user cannot register new notifier.
An authenticated user can list users.
An authenticated user can list users with pagination.
An authenticated user can filter users by username.
An authenticated user can filter users by email.
An authenticated user can retrieve current user detail.
An authenticated user can register new notifier.
An authenticated user cannot register new notifier with type promgen.notification.user.
expected_response: {"response_body": {"detail": "Cannot register a promgen.notification.user notifier for a user."}}
